tasks.title: Initialize Kimi persistent task memory
tasks.summary: Created kimi.json in server/src/memory/ and wired it into the MCP memory server so future Kimi sessions can recover context, continue tasks, and avoid duplicating work.
notes: Kimi task memory follows the same schema as Codex task memory for consistency.
Available MCP tools: kimi_task_upsert, kimi_task_list, kimi_task_get, kimi_task_get_active.

tasks.title: Enable Kimi persistent task tracking
tasks.summary: User requested Kimi start tracking tasks persistently. Updated kimi.json and AGENTS.md to formalize the requirement, mirroring Codex task memory rules.
notes: Mirrors Codex task memory rules for consistency.
MCP tools available: kimi_task_upsert, kimi_task_list, kimi_task_get, kimi_task_get_active.

tasks.title: Implement Ollama Intelligence Growth dashboard tab
tasks.summary: Implemented Ollama Intelligence Growth tab on the cloud dashboard with API endpoint, rich UI with charts, readiness scoring, event tracking, and supporting scripts/memory.
notes: Improved over the zip: added recharts timeline chart, score breakdown bar chart, visual gauge, event type badges, and contextual recommendations.
API reads from JSONL memory files (append-only) and computes aggregated stats.

tasks.title: Commit and deploy Ollama Growth + Telegram policy improvements
tasks.summary: Committed changes (fa0a4909d) and deployed to production VPS via Tailscale SSH. API reloaded via PM2. Dashboard built locally and synced to VPS due to Ollama CPU overload preventing on-VPS build. Dashboard and API both verified healthy.
notes: VPS was overloaded by Ollama inference (100% CPU), so dashboard was built locally on Windows and rsync'd via tar+scp.
API endpoint /ollama-growth verified returning 200 with correct data.
Dashboard process verified online on port 3001, responding HTTP 200.

tasks.title: E2E verification and gap fixes for Ollama Growth tab
tasks.summary: Found and fixed critical gaps: mixed-schema JSONL entries broke score breakdown chart, missing e2e tests, Windows-built standalone needed re-sync after fixes. All verified and deployed.
notes: Gap 1: HermesClaw writes simple health checks without category breakdowns; my code assumed all checks had breakdowns.
Gap 2: No e2e test existed for the /ollama-growth endpoint.
Gap 3: Dashboard build from Windows needed re-sync after code fixes.
All e2e tests pass (5/5). API direct, dashboard proxy, and nginx proxy all verified.
